_README: Template for scenarios.json. Copy this file to scenarios.json and edit. scenarios.json IS committed (it's shared config, no secrets). Anything secret or host-specific goes in perf.local.json (gitignored). See README.md.

app._doc: How to build/serve the app for measurement, and how to reach it.

scenarios._doc: name: short id used in the results row + as the skill argument. path: route to navigate to. readySignal: CSS selector OR 'text:<string>' marking real content on screen. dataItemCountSelector: elements counted as 'data items' (e.g. table rows). dataRequestUrlPattern: substring of your data-call URLs (e.g. '/graphql', '/api/').
scenarios.name: stocktake-detail-baseline
